matched_table_row: (new) C26/C27 util-aware reap fires before EXIT trap completes S3 PUT — pod destroyed mid-trap; `aws s3 cp || true` swallows ENOENT when `aws` CLI absent from the runpod/pytorch:2.4.0 base image, leaving rc!=0 with NO sidecar object

wall-clock ≈ 10 min/attempt — consistent with reap window (90 s uptime threshold + 180 s reap window + ~5 min pod allocation/boot)
spec_directive: NO_REPRODUCTION → ship Phase B + Phase C unconditionally as belt-and-suspenders (per spec §3 gate table and Task 8 decision table)
trap_silent_root_cause_hypotheses: (1, most likely) `aws` CLI absent from the runpod/pytorch:2.4.0-py3.11-cuda12.4.1-devel base image; `aws s3 cp` exits 127 (command not found); `|| true` swallows. FIX: prepend `command -v aws || pip install -q awscli` to the trap, OR pivot to a python+boto3 PUT body.
(2) RunPod terminate sends SIGKILL not SIGTERM after a short grace window; bash EXIT trap never runs. Less likely — SIGTERM is the conventional first signal.

(3) Diagnostic env vars not actually landing in pod env. UNLIKELY — Task 4 unit tests cover the merge path and the orchestrator override of cfg.diagnostic_mode via model_copy is on the generate path (deploy_session → _provision_instance_and_build_backend → _build_spec at orchestrator.py:567).
followup: C28 follow-up: patch render_provision A2 trap pre-amble to install awscli when absent. Defer to a small post-C28 task; does not block Phase B/C which the spec directs to ship regardless under NO_REPRODUCTION.
